programme.title: E409 - The Crew Builds A Pancake Cafe
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew wants to make the biggest pancake ever! But it's a sticky situation when Speed Meister wants to beat them to it.

programme.title: E123 - The Museum
programme.desc: The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: E102 - Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: E204 - Astropumpkin
programme.desc: Tim and Tommy try to grow the biggest Moon Pumpkin they can.

programme.title: E208 - Teddy's Day Out
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are having a picnic. Mr Zebra the Postman and Zoe Zebra are having a picnic too, so they decide to have one big picnic. When it's home time, Peppa leaves her teddy behind.

programme.title: E210 - George's Friend
programme.desc: George and Rebecca Rabbit's little brother Richard each have a toy dinosaur but they are not very good at sharing their toys. Mummy Pig shows them that they can have much more fun at the playground if they play together, just like their big sisters.

programme.title: E613 - Pups Save A Freaky Pup-Day
programme.desc: Chase and Chickaletta switch bodies and must learn to work together to return Cap'n Turbot's boat to the bay.

programme.title: E409 - The Crew Builds A Pancake Cafe / The Crew Builds An Airplane Wash
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew wants to make the biggest pancake ever! But it's a sticky situation when Speed Meister wants to beat them to it. // When Camila's plane gets dirty from leading migrating ducks home, the pups find a way to wash the plane... in the sky!

programme.title: E114 - The Treasure Hunt / Going Into The Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: E204 - The Crew Builds Library Treasure Tunnels / The Crew Builds A Super Snack Di
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew's favorite book series has new additions! But when there's no room for them in the library, the pups have to get creative.// The pups have a surprise just for Rubble... a snack dispenser! But will they finish it before Rubble finds out?

programme.title: E205 - The Crew Builds A Hair Salon / The Crew Builds A Colorful Crystal Show
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build a hair salon just in time for Grandpa Gravel's special photo-until they run into a squirrely shampoo setback! / Motor and Lily make a shiny discovery worth celebrating... with the coolest light show the pups have ever seen!

programme.title: E312 - The Crew Builds A Giant Tunnel
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: E842 - Fire Station Practice
programme.desc: Today is the fire station practise day. Mummy Pig joins with the other mummies to practise fighting fires. The fire brigade demonstrate their practice using their motto: Ready, Steady, Go!

programme.title: E210 - Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: E104 - The Trouble Of The Toppled Trees
programme.desc: Sam and Kit try to uncover who has been chewing down the forest trees.

programme.desc: The Go Jetters set out to stop Glitch playing dominoes with the ancient stones of Stonehenge.

programme.title: E12 - Pineapple
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits theatre, it's the magical Pineapple attempting to perform a very difficult magic trick with the help of Kiwi.

programme.title: E11 - Spooky Day
programme.desc: Supertato runs in fright when Pumpkin tries to make friends with him, but later realises she needs his help as she's stuck in the air hanging from balloons set up by Evil Pea.

programme.title: E12 - Pea's Power Suit
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Supertato, the world's first potato superhero as he tackles the mischievous Evil Pea, in the supermarket aisles.

programme.title: E9 - Magic
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: E12 - Sticks
programme.desc: Bella and Lift play with a stick that makes the perfect magic wand. They visit Patch, who has a tasty recipe - sticky stick critters!

programme.title: E11 - The Radio Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels decide to start their own radio show.

programme.title: E23 - Go Jet Academy: Whale Rescue
programme.desc: After a pod of pilot whales becomes stranded at the Academy beach, the Go Jetters, with help from new teacher Professor Wave, must work fast to return them to the ocean deeps.

programme.title: E22 - Tomatina Festival, Bunol, Spain
programme.desc: The Go Jetters get caught up in Spain's Tomatina Festival. The Tomato Battle takes place every August in the town of Bunol, near to Valencia.

programme.title: E23 - Arcade Dance Off
programme.desc: Stumbling across an arcade, Sarah takes on a dancing challenge with John, whilst Duck and Flamingo team up to try and defeat a video game!

programme.title: E24 - Moon
programme.desc: Stan helps his friends to get a closer look at the moon through a telescope, so they can do a show-and-tell.

programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: E40 - Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: E41 - The Puzzle Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are close to finishing a jigsaw puzzle.

programme.title: E7 - Strawberry
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'strawberry', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: E5 - Messy's Lost Balloon
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy loves balloons, whatever colour they are, but what is inside them to make them float up high into the sky?

programme.title: E18 - The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.desc: Bella and Lift enjoy making funny honk noises with tubes. They visit Tincy the Spider, who uses terrific tubes to make music with the Playtimers.

programme.desc: Luan thinks Mr. Coconuts is out for revenge when she replaces him with Lola in her act. // Hoping to drive out to the outlets to meet Lori, Leni ooks for alternative ways to get her driver's license.

programme.title: E106 - BoomBox Burger Bop
programme.desc: Trish and Bryce worry they've lost their creative edge when they learn their BoomBox Burger jingle is being replaced, so Lay Lay and Sadie try to boost their confidence by giving them a new music sound.

programme.title: E224 - Wedding of the Trentury
programme.desc: Captain Man & Danger Force offer to host the ultimate wedding for Swellview's beloved newscaster Trent Overunder and his online girlfriend Tracy426. When they suspect Tracy426 isn't who she claims to be, their meddling threatens to ruin the big day.

programme.title: E107 - Raph VS. Water
programme.desc: The Turtles and Mutanimals are caught in the Storm of the Century! But when a new group of SEA MUTANTS threaten the city... Raph will be forced to use his WORDS to save the day.

programme.title: E108 - Mikey Takes Charge
programme.desc: Mikey and Genghis Frog are sent into the storm on a supply run to the local market when they encounter the electrifying LEE THE EEL! Now Mikey has to step up and be a LEADER!

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E108 - Bucket Pants / A Best Too Far
programme.desc: Best and Bester decide Grumpy Pants needs more excitement and take him to have the most extreme cup of tea ever. // In this year's Capture the Flag contest Best listens to other people's ideas even if they haven't got a war room.

programme.title: E125 - Which Witch is Which? / Get Off My Lawnie
programme.desc: Bunny's mother visits from the old country. // Granny Tentacles gets her own spin-off show.

programme.title: E126 - Bubble Bass Reviews / Patrick's Prison Pals
programme.desc: Bubble Bass reviews The Patrick Show. // Bunny brings Patrick to prison for 'Bring Your Kid To Work Day'.

programme.title: E8 - East Region Premiere: Ufc Champ Tyron Woodley And Gold Medalist Hannah Teter
programme.desc: The competition moves to the Eastern Region as new competitors push their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host and executive producer Dwayne Johnson. In this episode, competitors will compete in a best of three competition where the winner will move on to battle a Pro-Athlete Titan on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The top female competitor will face Olympic gold-medal winning snowboarder Hannah Teter, while the top man will advance to compete against five-time UFC champion Tyron Woodley. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: A Resilient Super Grass Packed With Green Promise
programme.desc: Giant miscanthus grows fast, tolerates harsh conditions and is incredibly versatile. The climate phenomenon El Nino could bring record heat in a rapidly warming planet. Japanese tea farmers cash in on the matcha hype.

programme.title: From Popstar To Sanitation Advocate In Rural Ghana
programme.desc: Ghanaian singer Wiyaala returns home to the village of Funsi, using her fame to improve sanitation and bring better health to her community. Also: An artist in Mali is painting public buses to spread awareness about the climate crisis.

programme.title: In The Shadow Of The World Cup - Mexican Families Search For Their Loved On
programme.desc: It's World Cup season in Mexico - yet the spectacle can't hide a dark reality in the country. Over 100,000 people are still listed missing. It's believed many of them have been murdered.

programme.title: Does The Internet Have An Expiration Date?
programme.desc: Could quantum computers break the internet as we know it? Meta's AI is checking your age, Nvidia wants your PC to think for you, and AI is even entering religion. But at what cost?

programme.title: Is Africa's School System Failing Its Youth?
programme.desc: This week's show explores the push to promote African languages in classrooms, the challenges of changing entrenched systems, and the real-life impact on learners. Is it time to rethink how Africa learns?

programme.title: A Resilient Super Grass Packed With Green Promise
programme.desc: Giant miscanthus grows fast, tolerates harsh conditions and is incredibly versatile. The climate phenomenon El Nino could bring record heat in a rapidly warming planet. Japanese tea farmers cash in on the matcha hype.

programme.title: Mobility In Transition: New Solutions From Bangkok To Madrid
programme.desc: From female bus drivers challenging bias to metro parcel delivery and charging roads, new ideas are reshaping transport, logistics and work.

programme.title: German In A Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let's learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for “happiness” and various forms of “joy” through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: E25 - The Sweet Life Of Mr.Bee/The Doctor's Haunted Mansion
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are found in a bee hive. Deca attempts take the bee hive. The angry bees start chasing after Deca and Shiro.

programme.title: E407 - Teen Titans And The Easter Factory/Passive Income
programme.desc: Will a trip to the Eastory Factory be a magical time for the Titans or is it another one of the Easter Bunny's tricks?

programme.title: E53 - Game Over/A Dog's Life/Birthday Bother/Bed Bean/Spa Day
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes obsessed with gaming after being introduced by Mrs. Wicket's nephew. He decides he must have his own console, only to discover how expensive they are.

programme.title: E170 - Scratchy Wool/Wolf In Unicorn’S Clothing/Keep Off The Grass
programme.desc: Unaware that a pinecone is lodged in her pompadour, Wanda keeps scratching her head. Trico thinks this irritation is caused by lice, and it sends the flock into a panic. Wolf ramps up the paranoia to try and make Trico ostracize Wanda from the flock.

programme.title: E54 - A. The Friend/The Saint/The Society/The Spoiler/The Countdown
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin help Anais make up an imaginary friend who turns out to be all too real.

programme.title: E3 - Blade Games/Nap Spot
programme.desc: Benson learns a better way to motivate.

programme.title: E53 - Game Over/A Dog's Life/Birthday Bother/Bed Bean/Spa Day
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes obsessed with gaming after being introduced by Mrs. Wicket's nephew. He decides he must have his own console, only to discover how expensive they are.

programme.title: Doctor Vampire
programme.desc: Dr. Chiang, a Hong Kong surgeon, finds himself surrounded by beautiful girls in an old castle. Little does he realize these are the Count's vampire girls. He has a one-night stand with Alice who bites him while he was unaware. He gradually assumes the characteristics of a vampire. Alice breaks with the Count and goes to Hong Kong to save Dr. Chiang. That gets him into hot water with his girlfriend May...

programme.title: Game Of Death
programme.desc: When Billy refuses to be intimidated by henchman Steiner, Dr. Land orders his assassination to serve as an example to others. Stick sneaks onto the set of Billy's new film....

programme.title: Hitman
programme.desc: With a box of worthless war bonds, an old man hired the King of Killers to assassinate a Japanese trade lord. In WWII, the trade lord's action had caused grave damage to the family of the King of Killers. He agrees to take the job and delivers in a few days. The Revenge Fund set up by the trade lord kicks in. Whoever avenges the trade lord's death, killing the killer and the force behind him, will receive a reward of $1 billion. The police assigns Inspector to watch the killers, with orders to leave them room when they kill each other. Among the killers vying for the reward are Fu, a new immigrant, and his agent, Wong a longtime loser trying to score a big one riding on Fu's coat-tail. After an elaborately orchestrated chain of events, Wong and Fu manage to accomplish their goal.

programme.title: Marry A Rich Man
programme.desc: ME is embarked on her adventure to Europe to seek a wealthy husband, and she runs into ravishing DAN. Can she find true happiness and her glass high-heeled shoes as Cinderella did?

programme.title: Inner Senses
programme.desc: Yan always sees dead people. Jim, her psychologist, thinks it's all in her mind brought by loneliness and by unpleasant experiences of past relationships. He devotes all his time to curing her. Jim soon falls in love as Yan is freed of her vision. But then he starts seeing dead people too. Jim remembers his past. His girlfriend in high school, named Yu, committed suicide when Jim tried to break up with her in twenty years ago. Now, with Yan's help and love, can Jim face up to the ghost and end the nightmare?

programme.title: Hitman
programme.desc: With a box of worthless war bonds, an old man hired the King of Killers to assassinate a Japanese trade lord. In WWII, the trade lord's action had caused grave damage to the family of the King of Killers. He agrees to take the job and delivers in a few days. The Revenge Fund set up by the trade lord kicks in. Whoever avenges the trade lord's death, killing the killer and the force behind him, will receive a reward of $1 billion. The police assigns Inspector to watch the killers, with orders to leave them room when they kill each other. Among the killers vying for the reward are Fu, a new immigrant, and his agent, Wong a longtime loser trying to score a big one riding on Fu's coat-tail. After an elaborately orchestrated chain of events, Wong and Fu manage to accomplish their goal.

programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a casino heist during which innocent victims were shot, while Catherine and Sara are called to the scene of a murder in a remote part of the desert.

programme.title: E5 - The First Time
programme.desc: Sheryl, Brandon's old girlfriend from Minneapolis, stays with the Walshes for the weekend. Sheryl seems obsessed with wealth and fame and takes a liking to Dylan and his Porsche.

programme.title: E8 - The Mirror Crack'd from Side to Side (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hollywood star Marina Gregg moves to St Mary Mead and throws a benefit event. When a local admirer dies from a poisoned drink, Miss Marple and the police suspect the poison was meant for someone else and investigate who the intended target was.

programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: E5 - Beaux Beauxs at the Hobo Hilton
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don’t consider them a delicacy. programme.title: E6 - Bayou Meets Land
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. programme.title: Elément Terre[Live]
programme.desc: Le magazine Elément Terre' fait découvrir les projets et les sujets autour de l'environnement et du développent durable, partout sur la planète. '

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E1 - Tropical
programme.desc: Circle the equator for a look at the diverse species that dwell in tropical forests. Meet a lone sloth growing a mini-forest, lemurs that share and share alike, and elephants that tend to their woodland gardens. Then explore the region’s dark side.

programme.title: E6 - Amazon Monkeys
programme.desc: Get an inside look at the Pantanal’s most extraordinary primate families. Check out the ear-splitting cries of howler monkeys, the fearless leaps of curious saki monkeys, and the agile tails of highly intelligent white-whiskered spider monkeys.

programme.title: E3 - Love in the Air
programme.desc: Check in with animals who are winners at the aerial mating game. Take flight with a bee crafting a custom love potion, watch a draco lizard soar to fend off rivals, and witness the graceful pas de deux that bonds a pair of Japanese cranes for life.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E2 - Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighborhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night. For the animals that call this home, it’s a daily battle to stay alive.

programme.title: E2 - Seasonal
programme.desc: Watch the seasons wax and wane and learn how trees and animals help one another survive. Witness spring fireflies dancing after dark, discover summer fungi that cool off overheated trees, and prep for autumn migrations as the leaves begin to fall.

programme.title: E7 - Capybara's Pond
programme.desc: At the northern edge of the Pantanal, in one of the largest tropical wetlands on Earth, is a small pond that is home to an unusual family of rodents. They are not your typical rats or squirrels - these giants are the size of sheep!

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg

programme.title: E6 - Amazon Monkeys
programme.desc: Get an inside look at the Pantanal’s most extraordinary primate families. Check out the ear-splitting cries of howler monkeys, the fearless leaps of curious saki monkeys, and the agile tails of highly intelligent white-whiskered spider monkeys.

programme.title: E7 - Capybara's Pond
programme.desc: At the northern edge of the Pantanal, in one of the largest tropical wetlands on Earth, is a small pond that is home to an unusual family of rodents. They are not your typical rats or squirrels - these giants are the size of sheep!

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E1 - Tropical
programme.desc: Circle the equator for a look at the diverse species that dwell in tropical forests. Meet a lone sloth growing a mini-forest, lemurs that share and share alike, and elephants that tend to their woodland gardens. Then explore the region’s dark side.

programme.title: E6 - Amazon Monkeys
programme.desc: Get an inside look at the Pantanal’s most extraordinary primate families. Check out the ear-splitting cries of howler monkeys, the fearless leaps of curious saki monkeys, and the agile tails of highly intelligent white-whiskered spider monkeys.

programme.title: E3 - Love in the Air
programme.desc: Check in with animals who are winners at the aerial mating game. Take flight with a bee crafting a custom love potion, watch a draco lizard soar to fend off rivals, and witness the graceful pas de deux that bonds a pair of Japanese cranes for life.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg

programme.title: E2 - Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighborhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night. For the animals that call this home, it’s a daily battle to stay alive.

programme.title: E9 - Deadly Last Steps
programme.desc: After a young woman is found dead in her bathtub, the investigation focuses in on her estranged husband and her boyfriend. An unexpected digital clue has one of them confessing to the murder.

programme.title: E14 - Bucket List: Jail
programme.desc: An elderly woman gets arrested for domestic battery after fighting with her sister. Meanwhile in Virginia Beach, a 19-year-old boy gets extradited from Miami after missing his court date.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Companion piece to the movie Black Girl Missing. While the media goes into a frenzy over missing white girls, Black women's disappearances receive muted coverage and limited police resources.

programme.title: Sigabo[Live]
programme.desc: The series explores the stark contrast in the lives of two individuals: Gabo (Martin), a spunky, street-smart man from a vibrant, humble community, and Samantha (Montes), a tough, fearless law enforcer from a highly affluent and privileged background. It blends action, romance, and comedy as their paths cross and their different worlds collide.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: E4 - Fun Facts About The World!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning fun facts all about the world! He & D.BO shrink down to meet Ernie the Eraser, an aspiring magician who teaches them the science behind how erasers work. Then, they fly into the night sky to learn how fireworks get their colors & why some animals, like raccoons, prefer to come out at night. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how to be a cowboy in the desert & helps a brave spoon protect his cereal from getting soggy!

programme.title: E1 - Join JJ's Fun Learning Club!
programme.desc: Come on & join JJ's fun learning club! The adventure starts with a field trip to the farm where JJ & his friends learn to count to ten using apples. The learning continues in the classroom as Ms. Appleberry sends the kids on a scavenger hunt to find items in every color of the rainbow. Even lunchtime is fun, as the family finds all the different shapes in JJ's lunch! From taking care of pets to learning yoga, there's always something new to learn!

programme.title: E2 - Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E3 - Let's All Play Together with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's all play together with JJ! In this inspiring adventure, JJ & his classmates learn to never give up & help each other when they face an obstacle, spreading kindness with a simple wave. Then, JJ plays a fun game of 'follow the leader' with his dad! The learning continues as Ms. Appleberry teaches the class that it's okay to make mistakes. Plus, JJ's Mom teaches the kids how to properly say hello to a new pet!

programme.title: E3 - Songs About Feeling Good & Staying Safe!
programme.desc: Join Kii & Yii for songs about feeling good & staying safe! First, learn the best way to get a healthy smile in a fun & educational song about how to brush your teeth properly. Then, learn how to be safe when you're riding a bike at the playground. The lessons continue as Kii & Yii sing about being kind to each other, especially when a friend is sick. From learning colors to singing a soothing lullaby, these songs will make you feel good!

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E4 - Fun Facts About The World!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning fun facts all about the world! He & D.BO shrink down to meet Ernie the Eraser, an aspiring magician who teaches them the science behind how erasers work. Then, they fly into the night sky to learn how fireworks get their colors & why some animals, like raccoons, prefer to come out at night. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how to be a cowboy in the desert & helps a brave spoon protect his cereal from getting soggy!

programme.title: E3 - Let's All Play Together with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's all play together with JJ! In this inspiring adventure, JJ & his classmates learn to never give up & help each other when they face an obstacle, spreading kindness with a simple wave. Then, JJ plays a fun game of 'follow the leader' with his dad! The learning continues as Ms. Appleberry teaches the class that it's okay to make mistakes. Plus, JJ's Mom teaches the kids how to properly say hello to a new pet!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E1 - Join JJ's Fun Learning Club!
programme.desc: Come on & join JJ's fun learning club! The adventure starts with a field trip to the farm where JJ & his friends learn to count to ten using apples. The learning continues in the classroom as Ms. Appleberry sends the kids on a scavenger hunt to find items in every color of the rainbow. Even lunchtime is fun, as the family finds all the different shapes in JJ's lunch! From taking care of pets to learning yoga, there's always something new to learn!

programme.title: E2 - Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Favorite Songs & Stories!
programme.desc: It's story time with JJ's favorite songs & stories! First, sing along to 'Wheels on the Bus' as JJ & his friends put on an interactive show. Then, settle in for some classic tales. Watch as the three little pigs try to build houses strong enough to keep the Big Bad Wolf away. Then, find out who wins a big race: the speedy hare or the slow & steady tortoise! Finally, learn a lesson about working hard with the story of the Grasshopper & the Ants.

programme.title: Krazy Rich Korean
programme.desc: 'Just how crazy do you have to be to conquer the world?' Step inside the lives of the pioneers behind the Korean Wave, and discover what it really takes to achieve world-class success.

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist Of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

E4
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E6 - Killer Queen
programme.desc: The team heads to a target they believe to be the long-lost Marine Sulphur Queen. This massive tanker disappeared in 1963 with a crew of 39 and is one of the most iconic missing Bermuda Triangle wrecks.

programme.title: E6 - Pirate Cursed Gators
programme.desc: Jacob and Don venture into a cursed pirate swamp. Willie fishes solo after Little Willie takes a land job. Ronnie and Timmy battle poachers. Troy gambles on Pickle's new hotspot.

programme.title: E17 - Surviving The Impossible
programme.desc: Humans can survive catastrophic injuries and deadly scenarios that defy the odds in ways that are inexplicable. Is cheating death when survival is seemingly impossible simply fate or good fortune?

programme.title: E9 - Deep Space
programme.desc: While space has always been the final frontier, it's also been an unknowable one that every country has wanted to be first to conquer. Finally, newly released documents give us glimpses into their plans.

programme.title: E6 - Chasing The Ghost
programme.desc: Lauro kicks Iditarod training into high gear with a 300-mile run on the Denali Highway; Bret and Ivy go from checking traps to hunting moose and take the opportunity to bring down a large bull.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Having learnt where a hippos aggression comes from Steve wants to find out if we can live alongside the animal that kills up to 500 people a year. He visits St.Lucia, a town where hippos roam the streets freely at night, feeding on the manicured lawns and bushes of the townsfolk. In order to see them out of the water he must come back at night.

programme.desc: Nick's journey begins in Prague, where he learns about the city's remarkable 600-year-old astronomical clock from its keeper.

programme.desc: Two plus-size women who are body-shamed, head to London to prove that dreams matter and challenge the societal norms for beauty.

programme.desc: The emotional conflict between a maternal uncle and his nephew, delving into their strained relationship and the challenges that test their bond.

programme.title: Khandani Shafakhana
programme.desc: Babita Bedi working as a medical representative and the only earner in the house. She has to run a fertility clinic for six months in order to sell it or else she will lose everything.

programme.title: Heyy Baby
programme.desc: Three men living in Australia are surprised to find a baby on their doorstep. They do not know who the father is and start a frantic search for the woman who could possibly be the mother.

programme.title: Psycho
programme.desc: A Phoenix secretary embezzles $40,000 from her employer's client, goes on the run, and checks into a remote motel run by a young man under the domination of his mother.

programme.desc: When professional photographer J.B. “Jeff” Jeffries is confined to a wheelchair, he becomes obsessed with watching the private dramas of his neighbours play out across the courtyard.

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫
